name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.GsUpness
summary: ID for glancing spin. Character has to be more upright than this value for it to be considered on the side of a car. Fully upright = 1, upsideDown = -1.  Max Angle from upright is acos(gsUpness).
remarks:
Default value = 0.9f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
